stemHtml:
Refer to figure or to STUTTGART (EDDS) SID 10-3D from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
B-RNAV equipment required to follow ETASA 4B…

options.a: To comply with the minimum climb gradient of 4%.
options.b: To identify the overhead position at ETASA.
options.c: To know when to start the turn to KOVAN.
options.d: For guidance to KOVAN and ETASA.
